item.title: Chime to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 5, 2026
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO --(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jul. 16, 2026-- Chime ® (Nasdaq: CHYM) will release financial results for the second quarter 2026 on August 5, 2026 after market close. Chime will hold a conference call to discuss the results at 3:00 p.m. Pacific Time ( 6:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day.

item.title: Issuing/processing All Industries Keeping transactions moving: The critical role of stand-in processing (STIP) in modern card payments Article
item.description: Stand-in processing keeps card transactions authorized during outages. See how Marqeta's Commando Mode helps issuers maintain uptime and customer trust.

item.title: Small businesses aren't waiting for Washington to catch up
item.description: The conversation in Washington is dominated by two issues: helping consumers in a changing economy and helping American businesses compete. Affirm plays a role in both. We offer products that let eligible consumers pay for major purchases over time, often at no added cost to them and never a late fee, so they can manag

item.title: Bre-B’s launch: A payment team’s guide to Colombia’s new real-time payment rail

item.title: Stablecoins: a bridge for global businesses operating in emerging markets

item.title: dLocal joins forces with Google to help define Agent Payments Protocol (AP2): the open standard for AI‑agent payments
item.description: dLocal is collaborating with Google on the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2), an open standard that secures agent‑led payments across cards, bank transfers, and digital assets—advancing AI‑first commerce with verifiable intent, privacy, and interoperability.

item.title: Real-time payments (RTP): The instant revolution driving emerging markets
item.description: Instant and reliable—real-time payments are a core type of alternative payment methods (APMs), enabling faster, safer, and more inclusive digital economies across emerging markets.

item.title: Wise Expands North American Hub in Austin, Accelerating Regional Growth and Innovation
item.description: Wise has announced a significant expansion of its North American office hub in Austin. The company will increase its current office space by 200% to 90,000 square feet in total to occupy three floors in Domain Tower II, a tech innovation center in North Austin.

item.title: How pay-later is powering small business growth: Webinar recap
item.description: Small businesses are the heartbeat of the economy, and in today's fast-moving digital world, they're constantly looking for tools to grow smarter and serve customers better. That’s exactly what Affirm’s recent Small Business Month webinar set out to explore.
